launch_cutline.description: An M5 feature family carries a Stable (or LTS) public claim only when its proof-corpus plan is complete, the proof packet is current within its freshness SLO, any waiver is unexpired, every required corpus item is present and reviewed or published, the owner is signed off, and the public claim it backs is itself at or above the cutline. A family that loses any of those must drop below the cutline rather than inherit an adjacent green family.

contradiction_rules.title: Published label may not exceed the canonical effective label
contradiction_rules.rationale: A surface must never advertise a wider claim than the canonical packet.

contradiction_rules.title: Ingestion state may not read current when the source is narrowed
contradiction_rules.rationale: Stale optimistic copy must not survive after the source narrows.

contradiction_rules.title: Every surfaced row must disclose local-only/mirrored/managed/browser-handoff posture
contradiction_rules.rationale: Posture must be explicit on every operator/user page.

contradiction_rules.title: Service-health rows must carry an operational contract state
contradiction_rules.rationale: Service health must publish an operational state, not just a label.

contradiction_rules.title: Ingested canonical labels must match the live source packet
contradiction_rules.rationale: Detects cloned/stale numbers that no longer match the source of truth.
